hub_subtitle: Medical English to welcome guests and present with confidence

lesson.menu_desc: Greet a guest on a Zoom call: greetings by time of day, How are you?, small talk, and polite reception phrases -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 6 -- Welcoming Guests: Greetings & Small Talk
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Graziele Dias | Aula 6 -- Welcoming Guests

listenings.text: Hello Graziele, this is Doctor Carter. I am the guest for the meeting today. I am very happy to be here with your team. My weekend was great, thank you, and the weather is sunny. I am ready for our meeting. It is a pleasure to work with you. Thank you, and see you very soon.

Hi Graziele, this is Ana from the team. Our guest, Doctor Carter, is on the call now. Take a deep breath. You are ready. Just say: Good morning, welcome, it is a pleasure to meet you. Ask him how he is. Offer him a seat and a coffee. You can do this. Good luck.

extra_audio.text: Graziele opens the Zoom call. The guest, Doctor Carter, arrives on the screen. She says good morning and welcomes him. She offers him a seat and a coffee. They start the meeting together.
